eventPreCondition: Play if the Witch-king is in play.
eventText: Move the Witch-king to Angmar, then recruit two Sauron Regular units and one Sauron Elite unit there.
combatText:
Cancel the effects of the Combat card played by the Free Peoples player.
If the Free Peoples player did not play a card, add 1 to all dice on your Leader re-roll.
